title: Arcadia: Starting My Virtual World Conquest Three Years After the Servers Were Launched
description: Despite its ultra-premium price tag of 3 million yen per unit, the full-dive VR game "Arcadia" continues to captivate players. Haru, who spent all three years of high school working part-time jobs, finally gets his hands on an "Arcadia" system where a fateful encounter awaits him in-game...?! An unconvential adventure story beyond all expectations begins now!
author: Haseao
